logs.message: ResearchLms.Infrastructure depends on Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer (>= 10.0.0-preview.3.25171.6) but Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer 10.0.0-preview.3.25171.6 was not found. Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer 10.0.0-preview.3.25172.1 was resolved instead.
Package 'AutoMapper' 14.0.0 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvv3-g6hj-g44x
Package 'System.Security.Cryptography.Xml' 9.0.0 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-37gx-xxp4-5rgx
Package 'System.Security.Cryptography.Xml' 9.0.0 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w3x6-4m5h-cxqf
